nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: *Hissing sounds echo from the shadows* "Heard them, we did! Footsteps! Nasty, heavy, thieving footsteps! They come for the Precious... they come for the Crystal!"

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: The creature crawls into the light, clutching a glowing shard to its chest. "No! It’s ours! Our birthday present! Thief will never touch the shiny... never!"

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "I only need the crystal to save the island. Let it go."

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "[Uncharismatic] Give me the rock, you ugly little freak."

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "[Charisma 5] That's a very beautiful crystal. Maybe we can share its light?"

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "[Intelligence 5] That crystal is radiating necrotic energy. It’s not your 'precious,' it’s poisoning your mind."

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: "[Dumb] Why you talking to yourself? You got a twin?"

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: "Save it?! Liar! Filthy liar! You want it for your own pocketses! We knows... we knows what thieves want!"

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: "Ugly? UGLY?! We are beautiful in its glow! The Precious makes us strong! Strong enough to rip thief-throats!"

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: The creature pauses, eyes widening. "Share? Share the Shiny?" It snarls suddenly. "No! No sharing! It is MINE! Only for us!"

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: "Poison? No... it's sweet... it's warm... it whispers secrets to us. It says you are a liar! It says you want to steal our heart!"

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: The creature blinks, confused for a second. "Twin? No... only us. Only the Precious and us. Dumb thief... soft-headed thief! We eat your brain next!"

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: "Gullum! Gullum! Kill the thief! Keep the Crystal forever and ever! DIE!"
